project_type: Node.js Express delivery agency platform with real-time tracking via Socket.IO
build_system: npm with no build step - vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend served statically
test_framework: None - verification via curl and server start/stop
build_command: N/A - no build step, just start server
test_command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; cd /projects/sandbox/map && node server.js & sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@agencia.com","password":"admin123"}' && kill %1
verification_instructions: 1. Start server with 'node server.js'. 2. Test login: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials. 3. Test orders API with auth token. 4. Test driver endpoints. 5. Check frontend pages load. 6. Kill server.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed. Database already seeded. Just run 'node server.js' to start.
environment_constraints: Node.js v22 available via nvm. Network is OPEN_INTERNET. No Docker needed. Use: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; before node/npm commands.
contribution_requirements: ES modules (type: module in package.json). Spanish UI text. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend. Leaflet + OpenStreetMap for maps. Socket.IO for real-time.
key_patterns: Express Router pattern in src/ files. JWT auth via cookie or Bearer header. SQLite with better-sqlite3 (synchronous API). requireAuth and requireRole middleware from src/auth.js. Socket.IO rooms for role-based events.
directory_structure: server.js (entry point), src/ (route modules: auth.js, drivers.js), db/ (database.js schema, seed.js, data.sqlite), public/ (static frontend: index.html admin dashboard, driver.html driver app, css/, js/)
